calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sara McDonald, for and with petitioner Gina Isola.

The Court inquired concerning the need for filing of a bond. Ms. McDonald responded that the only two heirs are the petitioner and her sister Dora, who resides in Italy and has Alzheimers. She reported that Gina holds a power of attorney for Dora, pursuant to which she was waiving bond on behalf of both herself and Dora. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration without bond, subject to review of the order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
